untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'previous swing high' and 'recent swing low' which are chart pattern concepts not available as pre-computed indicators. The signal also references [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters for profit target offset and confirmation candles that are not specified in the source text. Pivot point r1 used as approximation for resistance level, but true swing high detection requires custom bar-by-bar pattern logic.
translation_notes: Used pivot r1 as proxy for 'previous swing high' resistance level. Entry conditions approximate pullback in trend (close above sma_20) with volume confirmation. Exit condition targets the resistance pivot. Stop loss set at conservative 2% pending specification of exact swing low threshold. Signal requires manual parameter tuning for offset pips and confirmation candles.
